backend/main.mo: Defines Motoko actor with types and state for goals, competencies, reviews, feedback, development plans, user profiles, and admin bootstrap/authorization logic.
feature_evidence.json: JSON report listing feature deployment evidence, related files, components, and test references.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summaries describing the purpose of multiple frontend files across routes, hooks, pages, and components.
frontend/DEPLOYMENT.md: Guide explaining how UniPlace Manager is deployed via Caffeine.ai and how to trigger fresh redeployments.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration defining design tokens, light/dark theme variables, and base styling.
frontend/index.html: Base HTML entry point loading the React application and referencing main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Sets up React app with routing, auth/role guards, Internet Identity provider, theme provider, and React Query client.
frontend/src/components/common/AccessDen: UI screen showing access-denied messaging with themed styling and logout handler.
frontend/src/components/common/AppLoadin: Full-screen loading indicator with spinner and muted status text.
frontend/src/components/common/EmptyStat: Reusable empty-state display component with optional icon, description, and action.
frontend/src/components/common/ErrorStat: Error display component using destructive alert styling with optional retry action.
frontend/src/components/common/Skeletons: Skeleton loading components for tables, cards, and charts.
frontend/src/components/layout/Dashboard: Dashboard layout wrapper providing sidebar, background visuals, user menu, and logout handling.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches a backend actor tied to the user’s identity and invalidates dependent queries when it changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useBootstrapAdmin.ts: Mutation hook that calls the backend bootstrapAdmin endpoint and refreshes related user role/profile queries on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useCurrentUser.ts: Fetches current user's role, profile, and admin status while deriving a verification status based on query results.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity login, logout, and identity persistence using AuthClient with full context management.
frontend/src/hooks/useLoginIntent.ts: Manages a stored login intent in sessionStorage with helpers to set or clear it.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for goals, competencies, skills, and performance-related backend interactions.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind base/theme configuration defining color tokens, dark mode variables, and custom surface utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point setting up React Query and Internet Identity providers before rendering the app.
Renders the admin dashboard UI with tab-based navigation for modules like users, goals, reviews, and analytics.
frontend/src/pages/admin/modules/AdminAn: Displays system-wide goal analytics by aggregating goal data and rendering charts for status and progress distributions.
frontend/src/pages/admin/modules/AdminCo: Manages competencies, including listing, adding new competencies, and assigning them to all or specific users.
frontend/src/pages/admin/modules/AdminDe: Provides UI to create development plans with descriptions, due dates, and assignment options for all or specific members.
frontend/src/pages/admin/modules/AdminFe: Form-driven module for admins to create feedback with assignment options and submit via mutation.
frontend/src/pages/admin/modules/AdminGo: Admin interface for listing goals, creating new goals with deadlines, and assigning them to members.
frontend/src/pages/admin/modules/AdminOv: Admin dashboard aggregating goals, reviews, and competencies into summary stats and recent items.
frontend/src/pages/admin/modules/AdminRe: Displays all performance reviews, handling loading, errors, and assignment badges.
frontend/src/pages/admin/modules/AdminUs: UI for assigning user roles by principal ID and showing role permission details.
frontend/src/pages/assistant/AssistantDa: Assistant dashboard with tabbed navigation switching between personal modules like goals, reviews, and feedback.
frontend/src/pages/assistant/modules/MyC: Displays user-assigned competencies with star-based rating and handles loading, empty states, and saving ratings.
frontend/src/pages/assistant/modules/MyD: Shows development plans assigned to the user, including status badges and due dates, with loading and empty-state handling.
frontend/src/pages/assistant/modules/MyF: Manages viewing received/sent feedback and submitting new feedback with assignment options and error handling.
frontend/src/pages/assistant/modules/MyG: Lists goals assigned to the user, allowing progress updates and displaying status, deadlines, and loading/error states.
frontend/src/pages/assistant/modules/MyO: Provides a dashboard summarizing goals, reviews, and progress, plus a preview of active goals.
frontend/src/pages/assistant/modules/MyR: Enables viewing and submitting performance reviews with assignment options, form validation, and feedback submission handling.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Handles Internet Identity login, admin bootstrapping, role verification, and profile setup flow with navigation and error states.
frontend/src/routes/RequireAuth.tsx: Auth guard that redirects unauthenticated or intent-missing users to the root and shows a loading screen during identity initialization.
frontend/src/routes/RequireRole.tsx: Role-based guard that validates user role and login intent, handling loading, errors, mismatches, and access denial before rendering children.
frontend/src/utils/authMessages.ts: Defines standardized authentication and authorization messages for role checks and error screens.
frontend/src/utils/branding.ts: Provides centralized branding strings for the UniPlace Manager UI.
frontend/src/utils/principals.ts: Utility helpers for parsing, validating, and formatting Dfinity Principal IDs.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Helpers for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters using query strings, hash routing, and sessionStorage.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending colors, layout, animations, and plugin setup for the frontend.
project_state.json: Stores the current project architecture, requirements, known issues, and state metadata for the build process.
